title: chrysocephalum squarrulosum var. brevifolium
intro: Chrysocephalum squarrulosum var. brevifolium, also known as the yellow buttons or short-leaved chrysocephalum, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum squarrulosum var. brevifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Chrysocephalum squarrulosum var. brevifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various ailments.
